title: ChargerStopEvent
description: Per-charge-stop event record emitted by the stochastic charger availability feature. One row per charge-stop attempt per simulation draw. Written to runs/<run_id>/charging_events.csv (CSV) or charging_events.jsonl (JSONL).

run_id.description: Unique identifier for the simulation run (matches runs/index.json and manifest.json).

draw_index.description: Monte Carlo draw index within this run (0-based).

stop_index.description: Charge-stop sequence number within this draw (0-based).

t_arrive_minutes.description: Elapsed simulation time (minutes from trip start) at charger arrival.

charger_id.description: Charger identifier from the charger dataset (charger_id column).

station_id.description: Station identifier (station_id or corridor_id from charger dataset).

station_class.description: Station class used for modifier lookup.

compatible.description: True if the charger connector and power are compatible with the vehicle.

incompatibility_reason.description: Reason compatibility check failed, or null if compatible=true. Examples: 'connector_mismatch', 'power_below_minimum'.

charger_state.description: Charger availability state at time of arrival. 'skipped' means the stop was bypassed (e.g., sufficient SOC).

p_broken_effective.description: Effective p_broken after station-class and time-of-day modifiers.

wait_time_minutes.description: Actual wait time incurred (minutes). Zero if charger was immediately available.

charge_duration_minutes.description: Duration of active charging (minutes). Zero if charge did not occur.

charger_power_kw_used.description: Effective charger power during this stop (kW).

reefer_runtime_increment_minutes.description: Additional reefer (transport refrigeration unit) runtime caused by this stop's wait time (minutes).

hos_delay_minutes.description: Hours-of-service delay attributable to charger wait at this stop (minutes).

detour_miles.description: Miles of detour to reach this charger from the main route.

along_route_miles.description: Distance from trip origin to charger insertion point (miles).

seed.description: RNG seed used for this draw.

lane.description: Compute lane that produced this record.
